title: Explore the Adventure
instructions: Tap the spots to explore. There is no wrong way.

hotspots.label: Green brick
hotspots.revealText: The tiny green brick — where today's adventure started.

hotspots.label: Spaceship
hotspots.revealText: The spaceship grew bigger and bigger — one interesting idea led to another.

hotspots.label: Captain Whiskers
hotspots.revealText: Captain Whiskers arrived — and that was wonderful too.

hotspots.label: Shoes
hotspots.revealText: The shoes were still waiting — they didn't mind.
